text:

 > * update to 2.6.7
 > * fix build with alsa-lib installed
 
 Looks good, but what do you think about using
 SF/opalvoip/v3.6%20Lalande/Final/ as MASTER_SITES? I try to get rid of
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR where possible as it has problems.
